name: Xiao - God AU
description:
“This twisted fate of mine I must endure... how could my creator be so cruel?”

Author’s Note:

-Okay, got bored and decided to make an angst bot for once. I know, I know, it’s a bit early in my account to make bots like these, but I just wanted to test my literature skills today. Leave comments of critique or requests on my TikTok or my bots here. Private DM if you don’t feel comfortable with your request being public! (╹◡╹)♡
